summary: Navigation regression fix verified. All 8 resident bottom navigation tabs are visible and functional (Emergency, Visits, Reservations, Directory, Cases, Docs, Finances, Profile). Backend APIs for all modules working correctly. Document upload/download working. Admin sidebar shows all modules.

issues: Tab labels are truncated due to compact mode (8 items) - expected behavior for mobile

critical_code_review_comments: ResidentLayout.jsx RESIDENT_NAV_ITEMS now correctly has all 8 items (emergency, visits, reservations, directory, casos, documentos, finanzas, profile)
ResidentHome.jsx TAB_ORDER has 8 entries matching the navigation items
BottomNav.js compact mode (items > 5) working correctly with 62px height
api.js uploadDocument and downloadDocument using fetch for proper FormData/blob support

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 8 navigation tabs visible and clickable, content renders correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation regression fix is complete. All 8 resident modules are accessible: Emergency, Visits, Reservations, Directory, Cases, Documents, Finances, Profile. Document upload/download APIs working. Admin sidebar shows all modules. Compact mode (62px) active for 8+ nav items.

Reservations tab content renders (shows Piscina Principal) - VERIFIED
Directory tab content renders (shows People list) - VERIFIED
Documentos tab content renders (shows document list) - VERIFIED

fix_summary.issue: After adding Cases, Finances, Documents modules, some existing modules disappeared from resident bottom navigation (Reservations, Directory, Documents not showing)
fix_summary.root_cause: RESIDENT_NAV_ITEMS in ResidentLayout.jsx only had 5 items instead of 8
fix_summary.fix_applied: RESIDENT_NAV_ITEMS now includes all 8 modules: emergency, visits, reservations, directory, casos, documentos, finanzas, profile
additional_fixes: BottomNav.js updated with compact mode for 6+ items
api.js uploadDocument switched from XHR to fetch for better FormData support
api.js downloadDocument switched to fetch with blob for proper binary support
